activity_summary: Created the per-day context memory system (context/2026-06-22 through 2026-06-25 _context.md) instead of a single static context.md. Validated that daily_task.tbl_wlsp_sarujanan supports context tracking through existing columns (activity_date, deliverable_id, evidence_refs, source_skill_file) so NO NEW COLUMN REQUIRED. Duplicate-truth GREEN - only a file-path reference is stored, not a second copy of business data.
evidence_refs: context/ folder (4 day files) + read-only information_schema column check
reusable_pattern: Day-wise context/<date>_context.md keyed to activity_date+deliverable_id; link via evidence_refs or source_skill_file
validation_rule: Context stored as a file-path reference only - never a second copy of business data
next_action: Backfill the context path into evidence_refs for D01-D03 rows on approval

activity_summary: Built leakage_dashboard.html as a single self-contained file (dashboardData embedded between HTML markers; no data.js). Created refresh_dashboard.py orchestrator and dashboard_refresh_prompt.md so a scheduled run regenerates only the data block. Designed a 4-hourly cron entry.
validation_rule: Refresh validates markers, JSON parse, required keys, caps, forbidden tables and no data.js
gap_or_risk: claude.ai-scoped MCP must initialise headless for cron
next_action: Run on the cron host with WLSP_PG_DSN/credentials set

activity_title: MCP headless execution feasibility and proof
activity_summary: Verified Claude CLI runs non-interactively (claude -p), the claude.ai postgres MCP loads headless, execute_sql works, and the full read to MCP-SQL to generate to marker-replace to write loop succeeds (SELECT CURRENT_DATE plus a test_dashboard.html proof). Classified GREEN for feasibility; flagged Python plus psycopg2 as the lower-risk production path.
evidence_refs: claude -p tool list plus execute_sql returned 2026-06-25; end-to-end marker replace proven GREEN
reusable_pattern: claude -p --allowedTools mcp__claude_ai_postgres__execute_sql for headless MCP SQL
validation_rule: Headless tool use requires --allowedTools or a permission mode
gap_or_risk: claude.ai-config-scoped MCP token may expire; nested claude unreliable under a concurrent session
next_action: Prefer the deterministic refresh on the cron host

activity_summary: Audited and fixed marketplace contamination - ppc_performance carries AMAZON, EBAY and SHOPIFY. Added source_name ILIKE amazon to L1, the L2/L3 PPC CTE and the L5 PPC CTE. Removed 19 eBay rows from L1 and eliminated the eBay seller account so_926407. Excluded UNATTRIBUTED from ph_summary (PH cards, rankings, dropdown, sidebar). L5 declining corrected - utharsika out, Illakkiya in.
evidence_refs: L1 145 to 126 (19 eBay removed); so_926407 removed; live MCP recompute
reusable_pattern: source_name ILIKE amazon on every ppc_performance access
validation_rule: ppc_performance must be Amazon-filtered; ph_summary excludes UNATTRIBUTED
gap_or_risk: Order-side queries were already Amazon-clean; only the PPC accesses were contaminated
next_action: Keep the Amazon filter on all future PPC queries

activity_summary: Root-caused the blank SKU in the High Shipping (L2) section to the L2 query being ASIN-grain without selecting sku. Added MAX(l.sku) AS sku so the dashboard SKU column renders. Verified 40 of 40 L2 rows now carry a valid SKU; L1, L3 and L4 already had sku.
evidence_refs: L2 record keys now include sku; 40/40 populated
reusable_pattern: ASIN-grain analyses must SELECT MAX(sku) for the SKU display column
validation_rule: L2 detail rows must contain a non-empty sku
gap_or_risk: Representative SKU (MAX) since L2 is ASIN-grain

activity_summary: Audited inconsistent sidebar counts (summary.counts vs account_summary vs ph_summary at three vintages) and regenerated the entire dashboardData in one query pass. Final reconciled counts L1=125 (COUNT DISTINCT ASIN per protocol), L2=212, L3=17, L4=33, L5=9 with zero difference vs source. Repaired stale L3 (added 4, removed 2) and L4 (added 5, removed 3) records.
evidence_refs: DB equals Dashboard, difference 0 for L1-L5; L3 17, L4 33
reusable_pattern: Single-pass generation - summary.counts plus account_summary plus ph_summary plus l1-l5 from one execution
validation_rule: Every sidebar count from one pass; L1 KPI = COUNT(DISTINCT ASIN)
gap_or_risk: account_summary L1 sums 126 vs KPI 125 - one ASIN spans two accounts (documented grain edge)
next_action: Always run the refresh as one full pass to avoid multi-vintage drift

activity_title: D04 preservation - refresh logic and regression guards
activity_summary: Folded the D04 fixes permanently into the refresh process. In dashboard_refresh_prompt.md added the Amazon filter to all PPC queries, set counts.l1=COUNT(DISTINCT ASIN), excluded UNATTRIBUTED from ph_summary and set account L1 to distinct ASIN. In refresh_dashboard.py added regression guards that FAIL the run on eBay/Shopify/so_926407 in data or UNATTRIBUTED in ph_summary. Proved the fixed queries return 125/212/17/33/9 and the guards pass and fail correctly.
evidence_refs: fixed-prompt SQL returned L1 125/L2 212/L3 17/L4 33; guards FAILED on injected contamination
reusable_pattern: Regression guards in the refresh orchestrator (marketplace plus UNATTRIBUTED plus L1 grain)
validation_rule: Refresh FAILS if eBay/Shopify/so_926407 appear in data or UNATTRIBUTED appears in ph_summary
gap_or_risk: Nested claude -p unreliable in this sandbox; deterministic SQL proof used instead
next_action: Run on the cron host to produce the first automated refresh.log PASS
